title: Wilson College Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Wilson College Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Wilson College has released the 2026 1st Semester results for FYBA and FYBSc courses on its official website, wilsoncollege.edu, on May 26, 2026. Students can check the direct result link and follow the steps provided to download their Wilson College results.

content.text: Wilson College has officially released the Wilson College Merit List 2026 for undergraduate admissions including FYBA, FYBSc, and other UG courses for the academic session 2026-27. Students who applied for admission can now check the first merit list released on 26 May 2026 through the official website.

Wilson College Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://www.wilsoncollege.edu/. The merit list includes results for various UG courses such as B.A, B.Sc, B.Com, BAF, BFM, BAMMC, B.Sc IT, and B.Voc programs. Candidates can check and download their merit list PDFs directly using the links provided or through the official portal without login credentials.

Students are advised to carefully verify their name, marks, and category details mentioned in the merit list. In case of any discrepancies, they should immediately contact the college administration for correction.

Wilson College has released the FYBA and FYBSc First Merit List 2026 along with other UG course merit lists for admission. The results are available online in PDF format, and students can directly access them through the official website without login credentials.

rows: FYBA, FYBSc, B.Com, BAF, BFM, BAMMC, B.Sc IT, B.Voc

content.text: Wilson College has activated the direct links to check the FYBA, FYBSc, and other UG course first merit lists for the 2026 academic session. Students can view or download their merit list instantly through the official website using the links provided below.

links.label: First Merit List - F.Y (BFM, BAMMC, B.Sc IT, B.Com, BAF, B.Voc)

sections.heading: Steps to Check Wilson College Merit List 2026

content.text: Follow these simple steps to check and download the Wilson College Result 2026:

items: Click on the "Admissions" or "Merit List" section available on the homepage
Select the relevant course merit list (FYBA, FYBSc, etc.)
Click on the merit list PDF link
The result will open in PDF format
Search your name or application number using Ctrl + F
Download and save the merit list for future reference

structured_links.label: First Merit List - F.Y (BFM, BAMMC, B.Sc IT, B.Com, BAF, B.Voc)
